stemHtml:
Refer to figure or to STUTTGART (EDDS) chart 12-2 from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
You are following the RNP Rwy 25 approach and are capable and authorised to fly to the LNAV/VNAV minima. What restrictions, if any, apply to this procedure?

options.a: The temperature must be at or above -15° C if the aircraft uses Baro-VNAV only.
options.b: The approach can only be flown by approach category A or category B aircraft.
options.c: NO vertical guidance exists for this procedure.
